TestCase z10Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_values = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_values, t1.values, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.values = follow_case_values;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check for empty array
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Sort array ascending
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        for (int j = 0; j < follow_case.n - i - 1; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.values[j] > follow_case.values[j + 1]) {
                int temp = follow_case.values[j];
                follow_case.values[j] = follow_case.values[j + 1];
                follow_case.values[j + 1] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
